# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3.8'

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: elastic/elasticsearch:7.10.1
    container_name: elasticsearch
    environment:
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m
    networks:
      - elk_network
    ports:
      - "9200:9200"

  logstash:
    image: elastic/logstash:7.10.1
    container_name: logstash
    environment:
      - LS_JAVA_OPTS=-Xmx256m -Xms256m
    volumes:
      - ./logstash/conf.d:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline
    networks:
      - elk_network

  kibana:
    image: elastic/kibana:7.10.1
    container_name: kibana
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_URL=http://elasticsearch:9200
    networks:
      - elk_network
    ports:
      - "5601:5601"

  apm-server:
    image: elastic/apm-server:7.10.1
    container_name: apm-server
    environment:
      - ELASTIC_APM_SERVER_URL=http://elasticsearch:9200
    networks:
      - elk_network
    ports:
      - "8200:8200"

networks:
  elk_network:
    driver: bridge
